changes.old: Emergency calls go to Kyle Ramos; if no answer in 45s, answering service pages him. Non-emergency: take message for next-day callback.
changes.new: Emergency calls go to Diane Foster; if no answer in 45s, answering service pages her. Non-emergency: take message for next-day callback.

old: never add customers or create service orders in PestPac
new: never add customers or create service orders in PestPac
never give out technician home addresses to callers

changes.old: Closed Sundays; human approval required for all PestPac actions
changes.new: Closed Sundays except 9am-3pm for residential; human approval required for all PestPac actions; never give out technician home addresses

changes.old: Take message for next-day callback; no transfers or order creation in PestPac.
changes.new: Take message for next-day callback; no transfers or order creation in PestPac. Sunday 9am-3pm residential calls only.
